text:
is the sixth story arc of the Attack on Titan anime.

Introduction

In the aftermath of the 57th Exterior Scouting Mission, Annie Leonhart lives a quiet life in Stohess District as a new recruit in the Military Police Regiment. There she reunites with her friends but comes to a chilling realization: the Scout Regiment has discovered that she is the Female Titan, and this time they will not let her escape.
